headline: Enphase Energy Targets AI Data Centers With New SST Growth Path
summary: Enphase Energy (NasdaqGM:ENPH) has introduced a solid-state transformer, or SST, technology platform tailored for AI data centers. The company has outlined a roadmap that includes pilot programs and a path toward volume shipments for this SST platform. This move represents an expansion beyond Enphase Energy's traditional focus on residential solar solutions. For context, Enphase Energy is best known for its residential solar microinverters and related energy management products. By...
